text:
CAHPS CRCR is included in Quality Composite Score 1433 Num 8 Equals 1 if CAHPS CRCR measure is included in the Quality Composite Score
I_CAHPS_SCORE_DECI Include CAHPS DECI in Quality Composite Indicator for whether CAHPS DECI is included in Quality Composite Score 1434 Num 8 Equals 1 if CAHPS DECI measure is included in the Quality Composite Score
I_CAHPS_SCORE_EDUC Include CAHPS EDUC in Quality Composite Indicator for whether CAHPS EDUC is included in Quality Composite Score 1435 Num 8 Equals
